nasb.text: and make straight paths for your feet, so that the limb which is lame may not be put out of joint, but rather be healed.

esv.text: and make straight paths for your feet, so that what is lame may not be put out of joint but rather be healed.

cnv.text: 也要把你們所走的道路修直，使瘸子不至於扭腳，反而得到復原。

ccb.text: 修直脚下的路，使瘸腿的人不致扭伤脚，反得痊愈。

csbs.text: 也要为你们的脚把道路修直，好使瘸腿的不至扭脚，反得痊愈。
